auth.label: API Key
auth.description: DocRaptor API key used as the Basic auth username. Copy it from Account > API Credentials in the DocRaptor dashboard: https://docraptor.com/login

actions.name: create_hosted_document
actions.description: Create a hosted PDF or Excel document with DocRaptor from raw HTML or a public URL and return its download URL.

name.description: A name for identifying the generated document in DocRaptor.

documentContent.description: Raw HTML or XML content to convert into a document.

documentUrl.description: A public URL that DocRaptor should fetch and convert.

test.description: Whether DocRaptor should create a test document. Test documents may include a watermark.

javascript.description: Whether DocRaptor should execute JavaScript during rendering.

pipeline.description: A specific DocRaptor pipeline version to use.

referrer.description: The HTTP referrer DocRaptor should use when fetching document assets.

tag.description: An arbitrary tag stored with the document for account-side tracking.

strict.description: The DocRaptor validation mode for input HTML.

hostedDownloadLimit.description: The maximum number of times the hosted document can be downloaded.

hostedExpiresAt.description: The ISO 8601 date-time when the hosted document should expire.

princeOptions.description: Advanced Prince PDF options forwarded to DocRaptor as-is using official prince_options keys.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a hosted DocRaptor document from raw HTML or a public URL.

documentUrl.description: The URL for downloading the hosted document.

anyOf.description: The hosted document identifier when DocRaptor includes one in the response.
The generated PDF page count when DocRaptor includes it in the response.

outputSchema.description: The normalized hosted DocRaptor document result returned by the connector.
